title: Low-bandwidth family status message
summary: Use one short format: name, safe or needs help, location, people together, urgent need, battery level, and next check-in time.
content: Use one short format: name, safe or needs help, location, people together, urgent need, battery level, and next check-in time. Send text before voice or media when networks are congested and confirm receipt. Do not repeatedly resend large photos or videos unless responders request them.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Low-bandwidth family status message”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Low-bandwidth family status message»
steps: Use one short format: name, safe or needs help, location, people together, urgent need, battery level, and next check-in time.

if_method_fails: Stop Low-bandwidth family status message, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
